channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Sessions' chief of staff charged in D.C. gun case
item.description: The chief of staff for Rep. Pete Sessions, R-Texas, has been charged with carrying a pistol into a House office building in December 2025, court records...

item.title: Delaney Hall snack purchases cast doubt on hunger strike reports, DHS says
item.description: DHS commissary data shows revenue tripled at Delaney Hall during the reported hunger strike period, undercutting Democrats' claims of dire conditions.

item.title: Dick Morris to Newsmax: Trump's mail ballot order 'brilliant'
item.description: Longtime political strategist Dick Morris called President Donald Trump's executive order routing mail-in ballot oversight through the U.S. Postal Service...

item.title: Graham Platner blasts new allegations as 'false accusations': 'Maine, you have my back'
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner calls allegations against him "politically motivated" as he rallies supporters in Bar Harbor amid multiple controversies.
